Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust The Small World Tree Company to get the job done right.

“The Small World Tree Company did an amazing job pruning our overgrown oak tree. The crew was professional, efficient, and clearly knowledgeable. They thinned out the canopy beautifully, improving the sunlight in our backyard. I highly recommend them!”

Maria S. Tree Pruning
Mar 15, 2025

“We had a large eucalyptus tree that was dying and needed to be removed. The Small World Tree Company provided a competitive quote and completed the job safely and efficiently. The team was careful to protect our property and cleaned up thoroughly afterward. My only suggestion is better communication leading up to the removal date.”

David K. Tree Removal
Nov 20, 2024

“After having a tree removed, we were left with an unsightly stump in our front yard. The Small World Tree Company came out and ground the stump quickly and efficiently. You can't even tell a tree was ever there! Great service and reasonable prices.”

Jennifer L. Stump Grinding
Jan 8, 2025

“During a recent storm, a large branch fell from our neighbor's tree and landed in our yard, partially blocking our driveway. The Small World Tree Company responded quickly to our call and removed the branch safely and efficiently. Their prompt service prevented further damage and gave us peace of mind.”

Robert M. Emergency Tree Service
Dec 28, 2024

“We hired The Small World Tree Company to plant a new Japanese maple in our backyard. They helped us choose the perfect location and planted the tree with care. The tree is thriving, and we couldn't be happier with the results. We will definitely use them again for our future tree care needs.”

Susan P. Tree Planting
Feb 10, 2025

“I was concerned about the health of a large oak tree in my backyard, so I hired The Small World Tree Company to perform a tree risk assessment. The arborist was thorough and knowledgeable, identifying several potential hazards that I was unaware of. I appreciated their recommendations for mitigating those risks and will be implementing them soon.”

Michael B. Tree Risk Assessment
Oct 5, 2024
The Small World Tree Company

Trusted tree service professionals serving San Francisco, CA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
